# Project: [Your Project Name]
# Generated by Kevin Z's Claude Code Kit

## Claude Code Integration
This project uses Kevin Z's Claude Code Kit (installed at ~/.claude/).
Available commands: /init, /plan, /verify, /tdd, /code-review, /checkpoint
Available mega-skills: mega-seo, mega-design, mega-testing, mega-marketing, mega-saas, mega-devops

## Tech Stack
[auto-filled by /init]

## Coding Standards
- TypeScript strict mode, ESM only
- Functional style preferred
- Error handling: fail fast, throw early, catch at boundaries
- Tests: Vitest (unit), Playwright (E2E)

## Project Structure
[Describe your project layout here]

## Key Conventions
- Immutable data patterns: never mutate, always return new copies
- Small files (200-400 lines typical, 800 max)
- Functions under 50 lines
- No deep nesting (4 levels max)
- No hardcoded values: use constants or config

## Development Workflow
1. Plan first: use /plan for multi-step features
2. Write tests first (TDD): use /tdd
3. Implement to pass tests
4. Review: use /code-review
5. Commit with conventional commits (feat:, fix:, refactor:, etc.)
